'''Torgas''' was at one time the head of the [[Assassin's Guild/Legends|Assassin's Guild]]. He attempted to assassinate [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], but was killed by [[Giles Durane]].

==Biography==
Torgas was the head of the [[Assassin's Guild/Legends|Assassin's Guild]] at the time of Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] first term as [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] senator. He was hired by General [[Emir (human)|Emir]] to kill Princess Leia on [[Challon]]. The first attempt on her life came from the [[Holopix News photographer assassin]]. He was killed by [[Giles Durane]] and his partner [[Gimlet]]. After the attempt on her life, they began to train her. Emir became upset with the failure, but agreed to pay the Assassins Guild even more, now that Giles had become involved. Torgas then sent three more of his top assassins to kill Leia, but once again they failed.<ref name="The Weapons Master!" />

Emir became even more upset at the guild, and Torgas decided he would go himself to kill Leia, though Emir realized that Durane was the only person who had a chance to kill Leia. Due to this, he hired him to kill Torgas and then Leia as well. Torgas attacked Leia in a hallway during an event on Challon. When Gimlet attempted to warn Leia of the danger, he was killed by Torgas. When Torgas attempted to kill Leia again with his venom touch, he was killed by Giles with a [[Rocket dart/Legends|rocket dart]], who was then killed himself when he tried to kill Leia.<ref name="The Weapons Master!" />
